programme.title: Alien Highway
programme.desc: The series tells the stories of places where incidents involving extraterrestrials probably occurred.Chuck Zukowski and his team of specialists explain the mysteries related to UFOs.

programme.title: Blowing Up History 4
programme.sub-title: The curse of the seventh wonder of the world
programme.desc: The secrets of building mythical and legendary buildings of antiquity.The program presents presentations using computer animations and the latest results of archaeological research.

programme.title: Blowing Up History 4
programme.sub-title: The Qumran Scrolls: The Dark Truth
programme.desc: The secrets of building mythical and legendary buildings of antiquity.The program presents presentations using computer animations and the latest results of archaeological research.

programme.title: How Do They Do It? 11
programme.desc: Documentary filmmakers reveal the secrets of the production of objects and devices.They meet inventive engineers and designers whose life mission is to improve reality.

programme.title: How Do They Do It? 11
programme.desc: Documentary filmmakers reveal the secrets of the production of objects and devices.They meet inventive engineers and designers whose life mission is to improve reality.

programme.desc: Documentary filmmakers reveal the secrets of the production of objects and devices.They meet inventive engineers and designers whose life mission is to improve reality.

programme.title: How the Universe Works 5
programme.desc: A series presenting the elements that make up the Universe.Thanks to computer graphics, viewers will be able to see unusual astronomical objects found in space.

programme.title: How the Universe Works 5
programme.desc: A series presenting the elements that make up the Universe.Thanks to computer graphics, viewers will be able to see unusual astronomical objects found in space.

programme.title: How the Universe Works 5
programme.desc: A series presenting the elements that make up the Universe.Thanks to computer graphics, viewers will be able to see unusual astronomical objects found in space.

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Big!
programme.desc: The award-winning British presenter Richard Hammond discovers the secrets of the world's largest structures and machines.The host will explore the secrets hidden by the most famous megastructures.He will learn what makes gigantic buildings resistant to sudden weather changes and unfavorable climatic phenomena.He will also talk to the people responsible for creating the most amazing projects of the 21st century.Together with Hammond we will see, among others:the longest subway tunnel and a cargo ship the size of four football fields.The instructor will not stop at mere observation and will personally test each of the discussed structures.Through a series of interesting and amazing experiments, he will also deepen our scientific knowledge, proving that small things often have great possibilities.

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Big!
programme.sub-title: The longest railway tunnel in the world
programme.desc: The award-winning British presenter Richard Hammond discovers the secrets of the world's largest structures and machines.The host will explore the secrets hidden by the most famous megastructures.He will learn what makes gigantic buildings resistant to sudden weather changes and unfavorable climatic phenomena.He will also talk to the people responsible for creating the most amazing projects of the 21st century.Together with Hammond we will see, among others:the longest subway tunnel and a cargo ship the size of four football fields.The instructor will not stop at mere observation and will personally test each of the discussed structures.Through a series of interesting and amazing experiments, he will also deepen our scientific knowledge, proving that small things often have great possibilities.

programme.title: How It's Made 26
programme.desc: In everyday life, people are surrounded by numerous objects.Few wonder how they were created.Most of them are ordinary, prosaic and uninteresting things.However, they often play an important role.

programme.desc: The hosts of the series take viewers on a trip to the fascinating world of the automotive industry.They show how dream cars were created.

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Big!
programme.desc: The award-winning British presenter Richard Hammond discovers the secrets of the world's largest structures and machines.The host will explore the secrets hidden by the most famous megastructures.He will learn what makes gigantic buildings resistant to sudden weather changes and unfavorable climatic phenomena.He will also talk to the people responsible for creating the most amazing projects of the 21st century.Together with Hammond we will see, among others:the longest subway tunnel and a cargo ship the size of four football fields.The instructor will not stop at mere observation and will personally test each of the discussed structures.Through a series of interesting and amazing experiments, he will also deepen our scientific knowledge, proving that small things often have great possibilities.

programme.title: Arctic Rescue
programme.desc: Fairbanks, Alaska has some of the most extreme weather in North America.When drivers get stuck on the road, three towing companies come to the rescue.

programme.title: Blowing Up History 4
programme.desc: The secrets of building mythical and legendary buildings of antiquity.The program presents presentations using computer animations and the latest results of archaeological research.

programme.title: Blowing Up History 4
programme.desc: The secrets of building mythical and legendary buildings of antiquity.The program presents presentations using computer animations and the latest results of archaeological research.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files 3
programme.desc: NASA cameras have so far recorded countless mysterious objects in space.Documentarians will thoroughly analyze the most difficult to explain peculiarities observed by astronauts in space.Outstanding scientists and astronauts will express their opinions about them.Viewers will see interesting footage.They will find out whether science can explain these mysterious phenomena and how likely it is that NASA cameras captured traces of extraterrestrial life.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files 3
programme.desc: NASA cameras have so far recorded countless mysterious objects in space.Documentarians will thoroughly analyze the most difficult to explain peculiarities observed by astronauts in space.Outstanding scientists and astronauts will express their opinions about them.Viewers will see interesting footage.They will find out whether science can explain these mysterious phenomena and how likely it is that NASA cameras captured traces of extraterrestrial life.

programme.desc: Documentary filmmakers reveal the secrets of the production of objects and devices.They meet inventive engineers and designers whose life mission is to improve reality.

programme.title: How Do They Do It? 13
programme.desc: The creators of the series show that even the simplest things we use every day are often the result of a technically complex production process.They show how they are created and function.
